case_title: SHU, LILLIAN vs. GEARY, PENNY C. AKA GEARY, PENE LOPE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHU, LILLIAN AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY, PENNY C. AKA GEARY, PENE LOPE DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHU, LILLIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHU, LILLIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARY, PENNY C. AKA GEARY, PENE LOPE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160-A LEXINGTON ST (GARAGE ENTRANCE), LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDING ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
